top_articles.title: Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
top_articles.summary: Fortinet has released out-of-band patches for a critical security flaw impacting FortiClient EMS that it said has been exploited in the wild.  The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-35616  (CVSS score

top_articles.title: Fortinet Rushes Emergency Fixes for Exploited Zero-Day
top_articles.summary: The improper access control bug in FortiClient EMS allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code remotely.

top_articles.title: TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Asian Government Attacks
top_articles.summary: A Chinese threat actor exploited the video conferencing platform to perform reconnaissance, escalate privileges, and execute additional payloads.

top_articles.title: Critical ShareFile Flaws Lead to Unauthenticated RCE
top_articles.summary: The vulnerabilities can be chained together to bypass authentication and upload arbitrary files to the server.

top_articles.title: New FortiClient EMS flaw exploited in attacks, emergency patch released
top_articles.summary: Fortinet has released an emergency weekend security update for a new critical FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS) vulnerability that is actively exploited in attacks.
